gigapan.description:
View from the top of Crittendon Mound.

This was shot with the Canon T2i set to the 35mm equivalent of 236mm.   I used f11 - According to my references the 
diffraction issue should be minimal at f11, and only possibly noticeable at f16, and I wanted Depth of Field.

It was shot with manual focus, focused just a 'nudge' from infinity.

I can use 1/3 of a second time per picture, which ends up as about 26 pictures per minute.
